author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas DAO Council - New Nominations and Election

It’s hard to believe six months have passed since the first Star Atlas DAO Council took office, but the time has come for a new election!  

A huge thank you to the first Council for their incredible work during these 6 months and the upcoming transitionary period:
@ROME|King Bryan-Titan Analytics 
@[AEP] Funcracker 
@[AEP] Bodhitree 
@DRUMCARL05 | ⭐Polaris Fuel⛽ 
@missionpoole 

If you're ready to step up and help shape the future of Star Atlas, nominate yourself for the second DAO Council here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1YYW_Ur1ZwNkwRmnQ4iiy9lgx2r2XHrr5bO0H8wmEJQs/viewform?edit_requested=true

TIMELINE  
Nominations: Today! (Ends March 20),Campaigning: Today! (Ends April 6),Star Atlas DAO Council Voting: March 24 (Ends April 6),Winners Announced: April 7,Star Atlas DAO Council Handover: April 11,
 | For details on election process updates and more, check out our latest article: https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-dao-council-election-a-new-chapter-in-decentralized-governance-a0858245ec4e

Mentions: @ROME|King Bryan-Titan Analytics, @[AEP] Funcracker, @[AEP] Bodhitree, @DRUMCARL05 | ⭐Polaris Fuel⛽, @missionpoole
